description_long: This is a pair of over-ear headphones with a robust, padded headband and large, cushioned ear cups. The headphones feature a striking red and black color scheme, with the headband and ear pads in black and the outer ear cup shells in red. The headband is inscribed with the word 'ZOMBIE' and the ear cups are labeled 'L' and 'R' for left and right, respectively, along with the word 'PRO' indicating a professional or high-performance model. The ear cups appear to be made of plastic with a matte finish, while the padding is likely synthetic leather or foam for comfort. The overall design suggests durability and comfort, suitable for extended use in urban environments such as streets, parks, or public transport.
description: A pair of red and black over-ear headphones with padded ear cups and a labeled headband, designed for comfort and durability.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, cushioned ear cups and the arching padded headband.
description_view_1: Side view of the right ear cup, displaying the 'PRO' label and 'R' marking, with the headband inscription visible.
description_view_2: Front view identical to view 0, highlighting the symmetrical design and padding.
description_view_3: Side view of the left ear cup, showing the 'PRO' label and 'L' marking, with the headband inscription visible.
